/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ravex_loader.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libravex_loader.so -o /home/abrakadam/VoltHack/src/main/resources/assets/ravex/natives/libravex_loader.so CMakeFiles/ravex_loader.dir/jni_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ravex_loader.dir/checks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ravex_loader.dir/optimize.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/jvm/default/lib:/usr/lib/jvm/default/lib/server -lpthread /usr/lib/jvm/default/lib/libjawt.so /usr/lib/jvm/default/lib/server/libjvm.so
